title: balanophoraceae
intro: The balanophoraceae rank is a family of plants that belongs to the division Magnoliophyta. It is a group of flowering plants that are parasitic in nature, obtaining their nutrients from a host plant. The balanophoraceae family is characterized by its unique mode of nutrition and growth, often forming a relationship with a specific host species. This family consists of about 30 species, including the genus Balanophora and others, which are commonly found in tropical regions.
